summary: Tested HRMS major enhancement: 3 new modules (Late Request, Early Out, Missed Punch) for both admin and employee, Leave module enhancements (leave_split, doc upload, LOP approval, admin apply for employee). Backend: 12/13 tests passed. Frontend: All new pages load correctly with proper navigation and form elements.

minor.issue: Response field names differ from expected (uses 'logged_in' instead of 'present_today')

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions - minor rendering issue with recharts

features_tested.admin_sidebar_nav: PASS - Late Requests, Early Out, Missed Punch nav items visible
features_tested.admin_late_requests_page: PASS - Page loads with Pending/History tabs, Apply for Employee button
features_tested.admin_early_out_page: PASS - Page loads with Apply for Employee button
features_tested.admin_missed_punch_page: PASS - Page loads with Apply for Employee button
features_tested.admin_leave_apply_for_employee: PASS - Dialog opens with Employee select, Leave Split dropdown (Full Day/First Half/Second Half)
features_tested.admin_leave_lop_approval: PASS - Approval dialog shows LOP Status dropdown (No LOP/LOP)
features_tested.employee_sidebar_nav: PASS - Late Request, Early Out, Missed Punch nav items visible
features_tested.employee_late_request_page: PASS - Page loads with Apply Late Request button
features_tested.employee_early_out_page: PASS - Page loads with Apply Early Out button
features_tested.employee_missed_punch_page: PASS - Page loads with Apply Missed Punch button, Punch Type select (Check-in/Check-out/Both)
features_tested.employee_leave_form: PASS - Leave Split dropdown visible (Full Day), Document upload field present
features_tested.employee_attendance_filters: PASS - Period filter (This Week/Last Week/This Month/Last Month) and Status filter present
features_tested.backend_missed_punch_api: PASS - GET/POST endpoints working (Check-in, Check-out, Both types)
features_tested.backend_leave_with_split: PASS - POST /api/leaves with leave_split field working
features_tested.backend_leave_lop_approval: PASS - PUT /api/leaves/{id}/approve with is_lop field working

critical_code_review_comments: All new modules properly implemented with consistent patterns
data-testid attributes properly added for testing
LOP approval flow correctly integrated in Late Request, Early Out, and Leave modules
seed_data_creation: Approved employee onboarding to enable employee portal testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new modules (Late Request, Early Out, Missed Punch) are fully functional for both admin and employee roles. Leave enhancements (leave_split, doc upload, LOP approval, admin apply for employee) are working. Employee user 'user/user' has approved onboarding status. Backend APIs all working correctly. Minor issue: attendance/stats endpoint uses different field names than expected but returns valid data.
